info.title: FarmFlow
info.description: FarmFlow backend API for farm management, IoT data, reports, and business dashboard.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: File storage, metadata, and content delivery

tags.name: Farms
tags.description: Farm registration, mapping, and agricultural data

tags.name: Assessments
tags.description: Assessment sessions and tree snapshot capture

get.description: Redirects the user to the selected SSO provider (Google or LINE) to begin the OAuth authorization flow.
Handles the OAuth callback. Existing SSO users are signed in; new SSO users are auto-provisioned an account. Returns an access token and the user profile.

200.description: Authentication successful - returns an access token and the user profile

schema.description: Authentication successful - returns an access token and the user profile

accessToken.description: JWT access token for authenticated requests

anyOf.description: Opaque refresh token; store securely on-device

400.description: Validation error - the request body or params failed schema validation.

schema.description: Validation error - the request body or params failed schema validation.

403.description: Forbidden - you do not have permission to perform this action.

schema.description: Forbidden - you do not have permission to perform this action.

500.description: Internal server error - something went wrong on our end.

schema.description: Internal server error - something went wrong on our end.

post.description: Creates a new account with a username and password. Returns an access token and the created profile.

fake.description: If true, creates a fake account that is excluded from analytics and can be easily cleaned up.
If true, creates a fake account that is excluded from analytics and can be easily cleaned up.

post.description: Rotates the refresh token: returns a new access token and a new refresh token, invalidating the one presented. Reusing an already-rotated token revokes the whole session family.

post.description: Authenticates an admin with username and password and sets HttpOnly session cookies. No tokens are returned in the body.

200.description: Admin sign-in successful — session cookies are set; no tokens in the body

schema.description: Admin sign-in successful — session cookies are set; no tokens in the body

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid admin session.

schema.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid admin session.

422.description: Validation error - the request body failed schema validation.

schema.description: Validation error - the request body failed schema validation.

post.description: Rotates the admin refresh cookie and re-sets both session cookies. Reusing a rotated token revokes the whole session family.

schema.description: Session rotated — new cookies are set

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid admin session.

schema.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid admin session.

post.description: Revokes the session family and clears the session cookies.

get.description: Returns metadata for a file. Public files are readable by anyone; private files require the uploader's bearer token.

schema.description: File id (cuid2)
File metadata

401.description: Unauthorized - this file is private and requires a valid token.

schema.description: Unauthorized - this file is private and requires a valid token.

403.description: Forbidden - you are not allowed to access this file.

schema.description: Forbidden - you are not allowed to access this file.

404.description: Not found - the file does not exist or has been purged.

schema.description: Not found - the file does not exist or has been purged.

get.description: Streams the raw file bytes, gated by access level. Public files get a long-lived cache header; private-file reads require the uploader's token and are audit-logged. Purged files return 404.

schema.description: File id (cuid2)

post.description: Creates a draft farm from the details form. Boundary and photo are added later.

patch.description: Updates editable fields. Sending farmBoundary (GeoJSON Polygon/MultiPolygon) recomputes the calculated area in Rai.

schema.description: Farm id (cuid2)

requestBody.description: Any subset of editable farm fields; boundary save recomputes the calculated area.

farmBoundary.description: Farm boundary as a GeoJSON Polygon or MultiPolygon; coordinates [lng, lat]
